summary: AMD hit all-time high of $353 on April 30. Q4 2025 revenue was $10.27B (+34.1% YoY) with record Data Center revenue of $5.38B. Q1 2026 earnings due May 5. DA Davidson upgraded AMD to Buy with PT of $375. Intel blowout Q1 read-through is positive for AMD data center demand. OpenAI 6GW GPU deployment commitment secured.
